a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Total official development assistance for technical co-operation, 2022

Technical co-operation
official development assistance
includes grants for education or training, and payments
to consultants and similar personnel as well as teachers and administrators serving in recipient countries. This
data is expressed in US dollars. It is adjusted for inflation but does not account for differences in living costs
Data source: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development
